title: poa palustris subsp. tanfiljewii
intro: Poa palustris subsp. tanfiljewii is a subspecies of the wet meadow grass, Poa palustris, a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Poa palustris subsp. tanfiljewii include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Poa palustris subsp. tanfiljewii may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
